title: Clean up project calibration execution plan
outOfScope: Do not start or implement Work Item 1; it remains pending by explicit user instruction.
Do not delete Contracts, Summaries, Cockpit status, release evidence, or referenced design documents.
Do not alter product implementation, governance behavior, release artifacts, or historical Work Item evidence.

sources.reason: Plan under review and cleanup target.
Archived Work Item records used to bind status and PR evidence.
Published release evidence and final release status.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only cleanup with explicit preservation and no implementation changes.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution and explicitly authorized this final cleanup Work Item.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The plan is retained as a historical audit record and states actual Work Item, PR, merge, release, and closure evidence.
Work Item 1 is explicitly recorded as pending/not started, and no unsupported completion claim remains.
Plan links, checklist status, duplicate/obsolete wording, and metadata checks pass without changing implementation or evidence records.
The final plan states that no new remediation Work Item follows this cleanup item.
guidelines: Keep the plan truthful, evidence-bound, and explicit about deferred Work Item 1.
Preserve all governance and release evidence required for audit and future closure review.

intent.problem: The execution plan must remain useful as a truthful audit and handoff record after the serial Work Item run; stale checklist language, missing closure evidence, and ambiguous treatment of the explicitly deferred Work Item 1 would mislead future collaborators.
constraints: Preserve the plan as historical documentation instead of deleting it.
Do not start Work Item 1 or claim the entire original sequence is complete.
Keep all Contract, Summary, Cockpit status, review, release, and archived evidence intact.
Record actual evidence only; a user instruction is not a substitute for execution evidence.
intent.rationale: A final documentation-only Work Item provides a durable, reviewable record of what was executed, what was explicitly deferred, and where the lifecycle ended.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；PR 检查完成并合并后进入 ai-close-work-item，但不要开始工单1；已授权创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR；把清理执行计划文档作为最后工单；后续类似任务改善流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Retain and reconcile the recalibration execution plan as an evidence-bound historical record, with Work Item 1 explicitly deferred.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All completed Work Items have traceable PR, merge, closure, and branch-cleanup evidence.
Explicitly deferred Work Item 1 is not represented as started or completed.
Final plan cleanup does not delete governance or release evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
